memory.summary: The stale air and roommate's hygiene issues are causing distraction, but relocating to the library will restore my focus despite my low energy.
Moving to the library fixes my immediate focus and removes the odor, but I still face sleep disruption tonight since the room issue remains unresolved.
I made solid progress on the reading response at the library, though my low energy and sleep debt persist despite the improved environment.
The library environment successfully boosted my reading response progress, yet my persistent sleep debt and low energy remain significant barriers to sustaining this momentum.
One hour of focused work at the library advanced my reading response progress, confirming the environment's effectiveness despite my lingering sleep debt and low energy.
I made progress on my reading response, but my roommate is back, creating a choice between addressing the issue now or waiting.
Roommate_R is unaware of the odor due to low energy, not malice, so a direct but kind request should resolve this without damaging our relationship.
After two hours of work, my reading response progress has increased from 0.75 to 0.81, confirming the effectiveness of my current effort despite lingering fatigue.
I made slight progress on the reading response, but poor sleep due to the unresolved room issue has left me with zero energy and significant debt.
Roommate_R is now aware of the odor and seeking a solution, which aligns with my earlier assessment that they are not malicious but simply unaware.
I've pushed the reading response to 0.93 progress, yet my energy remains at zero with a four-hour sleep debt and high stress.
I made minimal progress on the reading response despite working 0.5 hours, while my energy remains depleted and stress high due to unresolved sleep debt.
